options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of items to return

list.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting items list` to List items. Useful options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p.

get.help: Get details for a specific item.
get.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting items get` to Get details for a specific item. Provide positional arguments: item_id. Useful options: --table/-t, --properties/-p.

search.help: Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields.
search.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting items search` to Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Provide positional arguments: query. Useful options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --fields, --properties/-p.

items.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting items` for Manage simpletexting items commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth login` to Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. Useful options: --profile/-p, --force/-F.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth logout` to Clear stored credentials and browser sessions. Useful options: --profile/-p.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth status` to Check authentication status across profiles. Useful options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

refresh.help: Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token.
refresh.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth refresh` to Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token. Useful options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth test` to Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. Useful options: --table/-t, --profile/-p.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles list` to List all profiles and show which is the default. Useful options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles get` to Get details for a specific profile. Provide positional arguments: name. Useful options: --table/-t.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles create` to Create a new profile from .env.example template. Provide positional arguments: name.

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles set-default` to Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). Provide positional arguments: name.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles delete` to Delete a profile and its data. Provide positional arguments: name. Useful options: --force/-F.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth profiles` for Manage authentication profiles commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting auth` for Manage simpletexting authentication commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting cache clear` to Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `simpletexting cache` for Manage response cache commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

usage_instructions: Use the `simpletexting` CLI for CLI interface for Simpletexting API. Commands follow `simpletexting <group> <action>`. Consult `usage.json` before execution instead of guessing flags or argument order.
